summary: Weekly Tips and Affirmations feature testing completed. Backend API tests pass (22/22). Frontend shows Weekly Tip and Affirmation cards on home screen. Weekly-tips browsing page works with pregnancy (1-42) and postpartum (1-6) content.
seed_data_creation: Created test Mom user with due date 20 weeks in future for personalized content testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Weekly content feature fully tested. All 42 pregnancy tips/affirmations and 6 postpartum tips/affirmations verified. Home screen Weekly Tip and Affirmation cards working. Read more link navigation to /weekly-tips working. Tab switching between Pregnancy and Postpartum working. Week selector working correctly.

backend_api.GET /api/weekly-content/all: PASS - Returns all 42 pregnancy weeks and 6 postpartum weeks with tips and affirmations
backend_api.GET /api/weekly-content: PASS - Returns personalized content based on Mom's due date

frontend_ui.home_screen_weekly_tip_card: PASS - Displays Week 20 Tip card with tip text and 'Read more' link
frontend_ui.home_screen_weekly_affirmation_card: PASS - Displays Week 20 Affirmation card with affirmation text
frontend_ui.weekly_tips_browsing_screen: PASS - Shows week selector (1-42 pregnancy, 1-6 postpartum)
frontend_ui.week_selector_navigation: PASS - Allows switching between pregnancy and postpartum content
frontend_ui.read_more_link_navigation: PASS - Navigates from home to /weekly-tips page

notes: Required expo server restart for weekly-tips route to be registered. The route was showing 'Unmatched Route' before restart.
